hero.title: The Future of Payments, Today.
hero.description: Seamlessly integrate our powerful payment solutions into your business. Secure, fast, and reliable transactions for a global economy.

features.title: Why Choose Everpay?
features.description: Our platform is built to empower your business with cutting-edge payment technology.
features.feature1Description: Accept payments from anywhere in the world, in any currency.
features.feature2Description: Protect your business and customers with industry-leading fraud prevention.
features.feature3Description: Easily integrate our APIs and SDKs into your existing systems.
features.feature4Description: Grow your business with payment solutions that scale with you.
features.feature5Description: Gain insights into your transactions with comprehensive dashboards.
features.feature6Description: Our dedicated support team is always here to help you succeed.

stats.title: Trusted by businesses worldwide
stats.description: Our numbers speak for themselves. Join the growing community of satisfied Everpay users.

paymentPartners.title: Accept all major payment methods
paymentPartners.description: Provide your customers with the flexibility to pay how they want, securely and efficiently.

checkoutProtection.title: Secure Checkout & Fraud Protection
checkoutProtection.description: Protect your business and customers with our advanced security features and fraud prevention tools.
checkoutProtection.feature1Description: Leverage machine learning to identify and block suspicious transactions in real-time.
checkoutProtection.feature2Description: Ensure your payment processing meets the highest security standards.
checkoutProtection.feature3Description: Add an extra layer of security for online credit and debit card transactions.
checkoutProtection.feature4Description: Real-time fraud detection and prevention to minimize risks.
checkoutProtection.feature5Description: Securely store customer payment information without exposing sensitive data.

businessTypes.title: Solutions for every business type
businessTypes.description: Whether you're a small startup or a large enterprise, Everpay has the right payment solution for you.
businessTypes.ecommerceDescription: Seamless online payment processing for your e-commerce store.
businessTypes.retailDescription: Modernize your in-store payments with our flexible POS solutions.
businessTypes.marketplaceDescription: Manage complex payment flows for multi-vendor platforms.
businessTypes.saasDescription: Automate recurring billing and subscription management.
businessTypes.servicesDescription: Accept payments for appointments, bookings, and more.
businessTypes.nonProfitDescription: Secure and easy donation processing for your cause.
businessTypes.businessDescription: Tailored payment solutions for B2B transactions and corporate needs.

cta.title: Ready to transform your business?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses already thriving with Everpay's innovative payment solutions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have questions or need assistance? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
